title: Brogy Returns from the Duel
description: On pages 1–4, brogy returns from the duel as the hidden Baroque Works agents expose their role in breaking the giants’ duel and begin turning the Straw Hats into targets.
scene: Brogy Returns from the Duel. The hidden Baroque Works agents expose their role in breaking the giants’ duel and begin turning the Straw Hats into targets. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Go give it your all, Brogy!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: GABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABABA

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Sure thing, usopp! I'll get him this time once and for all!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: They sure do like their pointless fighting...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Don't you dare call it pointless, you ignoramus!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: In any case, let's return to the ship for the time being.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: I can't believe it's going to take a full year for the log to finish recording! It's absurd!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: We'll wait for everyone to return to the ship and then plan out what to do.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Wait a second! Wait!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: I must announce that I would be utterly useless in feeding off dinosaurs, giant monsters, and the like!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Therefore, it would be impossible for us to safely make it out of the jungle and back to our ship!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Wasn't it just a moment ago when you boldly declared something about becoming a brave warrior?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Yeah, but the key word is becoming!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: I want to eventually be able to take pride in my way of life but I'm not quite at that stage yet!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Fine... since Luffy and VIVI are supposed to be by the other giant's home,

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Let's go meet up with them first.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: One day...

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: No matter what happens,

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Even if I were to die alone on a deserted island...

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: I'd look back proudly at my life and as I die, I'll yell,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: "I am usopp, brave warrior of the seas!"

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: That's how my last moments will be!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Yup!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Yeah, yeah...

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Just try to turn into a reliable warrior before we die of old age, okay?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Uh, yeah...

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Ahhh! What're you doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Move your damn house off of me!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You can't stop me.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It may have been over a hundred years ago... since this battle began...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: But running away from a battle that has already begun,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: is to run away from being a warrior.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: and to no longer be a warrior,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: is to no longer be myself.

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on brogy returns from the duel. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
